purpose.title: What brings you here today?
purpose.subtitle: Tell us your goal and we’ll tailor the whole application around it.

refi.title: Refinance
refi.desc: Replace your current mortgage or take cash out of your equity.

buy.title: Buy a home
buy.desc: Finance a new purchase — whether you’re shopping or under contract.

privacy.label: Privacy notice (CA):
privacy.body: We collect personal information to process your application. See our

refiGoal.title: What’s your refinance goal?
refiGoal.subtitle: This helps us recommend the right loan structure for you.

lower.title: Lower rate or payment
lower.desc: Reduce your monthly cost or lock a lower interest rate.

cash.title: Cash out equity
cash.desc: Tap into your home’s value and take cash at closing.

buyStage.title: Where are you in the process?
buyStage.subtitle: Just looking or already under contract — we’ve got you either way.

preapproval.title: I need a pre-approval
preapproval.desc: Still shopping and want to know your budget with confidence.

offer.title: My offer was accepted
offer.desc: You’re under contract and ready to move forward.

fillMethod.title: How would you like to fill it out?
fillMethod.subtitle: Switch anytime — your progress carries over either way.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.desc: Upload your W-2s or bank statements — we pre-fill about 80% in minutes.

manual.title: Fill it out myself
manual.desc: Go step by step through the form at your own pace.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Upload a few documents
step1.desc: Your ID, recent pay stubs, and bank statements — that’s the hard part done.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: AI drafts your application
step2.desc: Our assistant reads your files and fills in about 80% automatically.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Review & submit
step3.desc: Check the details, e-sign, and send it straight to your loan officer.
